'''''Horvus''''' was a group of three [[CR92a Assassin-class corvette|''Assassin''-class corvettes]] used by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. Carrying equipment, the corvettes arrived in the [[Pakuuni system/Legends|Pakuuni system]] along with [[Victory-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Victory''-class Star Destroyer]] [[Stalwart (Victory-class)|''Stalwart'']] just as Imperial [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighters]] were finishing off the last of a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] counterattack on the construction site of the proposed [[XQ1 Platform]] ''[[NL-1]]'' during the [[Battle on the Frontier]].

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: TIE Fighter (video game)|''Star Wars: TIE Fighter'']]
